title: Volcanic Dark
body:
![The words "Volcanic Dark" on a background of various containers and buttons.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3937c23632ee21d753f61e990cdd26bf1db30e80_0.webp)

As a dark mode resource pack, Volcanic Dark aims to fill the niche of those who want UI that is both pleasing to look at and is *actually* dark.

This pack also prioritizes visual clarity; You should be able to *see* what you're doing, after all.

### Note on Feature Availability
Every feature is confirmed working starting from 1.21.4. [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) is supported starting from 1.21

Versions prior to 1.21.2 may be missing some features present in screenshots in the gallery due to older versions of Minecraft simply missing support for later resource pack features. Additionally, colored shulker boxes require either [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) or an OptiFine alternative like [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui/).

<details>
<summary>Currently Supported Mods</summary>
  
- AppleSkin
- AuthMe
- Better Command Block UI
- Enchanted's Sodium Options
- Entity Texture and Model Features
- Inventory Blur
- InventoryProfilesNext
- ItemSwapper
- ModMenu
- ReplayMod
- Respackopts
- RoughlyEnoughItems
- SimpleVoiceChat
</details>

<details>
<summary>Terms of Use</summary>
  
For the sake of transparency, while this is under All Rights Reserved, there are plenty of things you are allowed to do with this resource pack. *Note that this list is subject to change in the future. Likely if I find a license that actually has all this stuff included.*
  
### You are allowed to:
- Include this resource pack in any modpacks, videos, and/or showcases. While not required, linking back to this project would be *highly* appreciated!
- Make and upload your own resource packs using this style to add support for more mods provided you try not to include files from this project and clarify that it was made by someone else. "Unofficial", if you will.
- Steal and modify non-unique assets from this project to help make your own resource packs (like the pack.mcmeta file). Ye.

### You are ***NOT*** allowed to:
- Reupload this pack to other resource pack hosting sites, *especially* not scammy ones.
- Port this resource pack to Minecraft: Bedrock Edition, or any other Minecrafts, Bedrocks, or Editions.
- Redistribute a modified version of this resource pack.
- Attempt to sell this thing. Come on now.
- Steal unique assets. Generic stuff like core shaders and "items" .json files are perfectly fine to take and reference, but don't grab a texture from this and put it into your own pack please.
- To reiterate, my resource packs are only available on Modrinth and CurseForge (and sometimes GitHub). **If you are reading this, are not on one of those two platforms and the thief was stupid enough to leave this message in, you should probably leave, purge everything to do with the site you were just on, and run an antivirus scan.**
</details>
